welcome.title: Welcome to Direct Credit!
welcome.description: We'll guide you through the main features to manage your dealership's direct financing. Click 'Next' to begin.

header.title: Financing Header
header.description:
Here you'll find:

• Page title
• Button to create new financing

💡 Tip: You can add direct financing for vehicles you sell with your own payment plans.

form.title: Financing Form
form.description:
When clicking 'New Financing', the form appears to register:

• Financing customer
• Financed vehicle
• Down payment amount
• Monthly installment
• Monthly payment day
• Total installments
• Start date
• Additional notes

💡 Tip: Complete all fields to keep precise control of payments.

list.title: Financing List
list.description:
View all active financing with:

• Customer and financed vehicle
• Down payment and monthly installment amount
• Current financing status
• Next scheduled payment
• Financing progress
• Button to view full details

💡 Tip: Click 'View Detail' to access the complete payment schedule and register completed payments.

finish.title: Ready to Manage Financing!
finish.description: You now know the tools to manage your dealership's direct financing. You can view this tour again at any time.
